programme.title: Building Britain's Canals
programme.desc: Writer and historian Dan Jones examines the creation of the picturesque Kennet and Avon Canal, which was born from a murky pool of dirty deals and demanding landowners. It came into being thanks to the genius of young engineer John Rennie, whose inspiration and innovations created a waterway that linked Bristol to London. Dan discovers how Rennie plotted the canal's route using the most basic of surveying instruments and marvels at the engineering innovations that made it all possible, such as the water-powered pumping station at Claverton(n)

programme.title: The Wonderful World of Crafting
programme.desc: Michelle Ackerley and Rosie Wolfenden follow as four hobby crafters present their works in needle-felt, plastic sculpting and wooden furniture at the Crafty Vintage Fair at Lowther Castle in Penrith, Cumbria(n)

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: In Dorset, property developer Claire Donovan and her family swap homes and lives with warehouse worker Jason White and his clan. The Donovans live in a six-bedroom farmhouse with six acres and a swimming pool in the countryside, while the Whites rent a narrow two-bedroom railway cottage in Blandford(n)

programme.title: My Posh Date
programme.desc: One-off show in which people from opposite ends of Britain's class system go on a series of dates to find out if love can bridge the divide. First up are gas fitter Jack and trainee barrister Holly. She introduces him to her favourite pastime, horse riding, while he introduces her to his mum, who worries about her son going out with a posh girl. Meanwhile, prosperous Sam takes teacher Amy on a picnic and punting extravaganza - but will her passion for kebabs prove too much for her privileged would-be partner?(n)

programme.title: One Night with My Ex
programme.desc: Suspicions of cheating destroyed the trust between Kenya and Saed, and they haven't seen each other for two years. They are reunited to talk about what went wrong. Cameras also follow Ryan, who is desperate to get back with Georgina, while Lizzie and Olivia split up but still have strong feelings for each other(n)

programme.title: Mary, Queen of Scots (1971)
programme.desc: Historical biopic about the life and loves of the ill-fated 16th-century monarch, whose opposition to her cousin Elizabeth I led to her downfall and execution. Starring Vanessa Redgrave, Glenda Jackson, Timothy Dalton, Patrick McGoohan, Nigel Davenport and Ian Holm(n)

programme.title: D-Day the Sixth of June (1956)
programme.desc: A British colonel and an American captain board a ship heading out on a dangerous mission as part of the Normandy Landings. As the two men prepare for the battle to come, they both reminisce about their love for the same woman. Second World War drama, starring Robert Taylor, Richard Todd, Dana Wynter and Edmond O'Brien(n)

programme.title: Joker Interview Special
programme.desc: Star Joaquin Phoenix and writer/director Todd Phillips discuss the making of their dark dramatic take on the origin of the famous comic-book villain(n)

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth (1959)
programme.desc: An explorer discovers a prehistoric monster-infested world deep beneath Earth's crust and faces a tough ordeal escaping the predatory attacks of the creatures as he tries to guide his team back to safety. Sci-fi adventure based on Jules Verne's novel, starring Pat Boone, James Mason, Arlene Dahl and Diane Baker(n)

programme.title: The Day Shall Come Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Chris Morris and stars Marchant Davis and Kayvan Novak talk about making their new 'comedy with consequences'(n)

programme.title: Eragon (2006)
programme.desc: A young farm boy discovers a dragon's egg, which hatches into the last surviving specimen of its mighty race. His friendship with the winged creature soon comes in handy when he discovers he is destined to overthrow the evil tyrant who has taken control of the kingdom. Fantasy adventure, starring Ed Speleers, Jeremy Irons, Robert Carlyle and Sienna Guillory, with Rachel Weisz providing the voice of the dragon(n)

programme.title: Joker Interview Special
programme.desc: Star Joaquin Phoenix and writer/director Todd Phillips discuss the making of their dark dramatic take on the origin of the famous comic-book villain(n)

As he breaks in some new recruits - including an insubordinate former Olympic swimmer - he has to contend with a dangerous new drug sweeping the beach. Action comedy based on the TV series, starring Dwayne Johnson, Zac Efron, Alexandra Daddario and Priyanka Chopra(n)

programme.desc: A mercenary in a post-apocalyptic future accepts a job escorting a mysterious girl and the nun protecting her from Russia to New York. Along the way, she exhibits strange powers that could hold the key to mankind's salvation - but various factions are plotting to put her gifts to their own use. Sci-fi adventure, starring Vin Diesel, Michelle Yeoh, Melanie Thierry, Gerard Depardieu and Charlotte Rampling(n)

programme.title: Dude, Where's My Car? (2000)
programme.desc: Two friends wake up with the realisation they have absolutely no memory of the events of the night before. They set about retracing their steps - only to stumble across a host of crazy characters, a flock of marauding ostriches and a fanatical alien-worshipping cult. Comedy, starring Seann William Scott, Ashton Kutcher, Jennifer Garner and Kristy Swanson(n)

programme.title: Gun Fury (1953)
programme.desc: A wealthy rancher and his fiancee take the stagecoach to California, where they intend to start a new life in the wake of the Civil War. However, during the journey an ex-Confederate outlaw and his gang of thugs attack the coach and kidnap the bride-to-be. Distraught and wounded, the rancher sets out to rescue her and punish her abductors. Western, with Rock Hudson, Donna Reed, Lee Marvin and Phil Carey(n)

programme.title: The Far Horizons (1955)
programme.desc: In 1803, Meriwether Lewis and William Clark set out to chart the Louisiana Territory, with their trek taking them through the unknown the Pacific Northwest, guided by a Shoshone woman called Sacajawea. Western, starring Fred MacMurray, Charlton Heston, Donna Reed and Barbara Hale(n)

programme.title: Pony Express (1953)

However, they have to contend with saboteurs planning to prevent California becoming part of the Union. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Forrest Tucker, Rhonda Fleming and Jan Sterling(n)

programme.title: Hell Is for Heroes (1962)
programme.desc: A rebellious soldier defies orders to lead two men on a secret attack on a German pillbox, but his mission fails and the other two soldiers are killed. Court-martialled for his actions, he remains convinced his plan was sound and ignores the sentence to make a second attempt at destroying the emplacement. Second World War adventure, with Steve McQueen, James Coburn and Bobby Darin(n)

programme.title: The Maze Runner (2014)

Sci-fi adventure based on James Dashner's novel, starring Dylan O'Brien, Kaya Scodelario and Patricia Clarkson(n)

programme.title: Shot Caller (2017)

Starring Tom Hardy as both twins, with Emily Browning, Christopher Eccleston and David Thewlis(n)

programme.title: We're No Angels (1955)

programme.title: The Flight of the Phoenix (1965)

Adventure, starring James Stewart, Richard Attenborough, Peter Finch and Ernest Borgnine(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The officers head off for the annual conference, which is usually a good excuse for a big party. But their fun is ruined when Holt asks them to be on their best behaviour(n)

programme.desc: Amy vanishes shortly before she is due to take her sergeant's exam, leaving Jake and Rosa with just a few hours to find her and bring her back to sit the test before it is too late. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Furnero(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: The duo head off for an amazing adventure in Atlantis. Meanwhile, the Citadel of Ricks undergoes major changes as it prepares for its first democratic presidential election(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick shows Morty a room filled with disturbing memories that Morty had begged him to erase from his mind. However, when a curious Morty asks Rick to restore the recollections for him, things rapidly go off the rails(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton advises Christine and Richard Turley, who are seeking to buy a holiday home in Portugal that they can share with their families. Working with a budget of £190,000, Laura shows them five properties close to the beaches of the Western Algarve, but will any meet their exacting standards?(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Lynn and Brett Merritt from Hampshire fell in love with laid-back Cape Verde the moment they stepped off the plane on their first visit, and have been dreaming of buying a holiday home there ever since. Jasmine Harman shows them five properties on this stunning speck in the Atlantic within their £55,000 budget(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer and Kirstie Allsopp meet the Pogsons in Harrogate, North Yorkshire and offer advice to the family who are unsure whether to renovate their property or find a new home. After living in their three-bedroom house for 16 years, Carol thinks that it is time for a big change, but Andrew is adamant he is not moving house(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge fixes up his temperamental van at his chateau, while Erin and JB start work on their honeymoon suite and solarium/sun room(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sports fanatic James Cox hosts the first of the week's dinner parties in Northampton, and he is confident that his French-Italian menu will bag him the £1,000 prize. However, some of his guests - Barb Wiles, Donna Harris, Duncan Fielding and Caroline Nash - are left confused by his Vichyssoise soup starter, and the tiramisu causes one of them to choke(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mother-of-three Donna Harris hosts the second dinner party in Northampton, and hopes that three courses of pure comfort-food will be enough to secure the £1,000 prize. Donna spends almost as much time fixing her make-up as she does preparing the meal, and when guests Duncan Fielding and Caroline Nash discover a secret stash of football shirts, they realise there is more to their hostess than meets the eye(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Part-time actress Caroline Nash is the host on day three of the competition in Northampton, and she hopes that a menu based on her travels will dazzle her guests. However, the night gets off to a shaky start as Donna Harris finds a hair on the side of her goat's cheese salad, while businessman Duncan Fielding seems more interested in goats themselves than the food(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Party-loving Barb Wiles hosts the fourth dinner party in the Northampton area, and hopes her Australian-themed menu will wow her guests and win her the £1,000 prize. However, the competitors are unnerved by her interest in extraterrestrials while snooping around her bedroom, and things go from bad to worse when a seafood starter and undercooked chicken result in tears at the dinner table(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Attention-loving businessman and keen cricketer Duncan Fielding takes centre stage in hosting the final dinner party from Northampton. He creates a menu based on the story of his life - which is full of surprises and full of spice - but it proves a challenge for three of his guests, who like their food mild. His main feature is a chicken and reindeer curry, and the table is impressed to discover that he runs a community pub from the bottom of his garden(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole refurbishes a classic Ford Mustang and a neon garage sign, while Simon O'Brien restores a classic Chopper bicycle and turns a bass guitar into a chair(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Two of the young Asian elephants contract the herpes virus, leaving the keepers doing everything they can to save the animals' lives, using anti-viral medication and a pioneering blood transfusion. When silvery gibbon Tilu gives birth, dad Alven has to keep their older son, tearaway Eko, in check. The keepers wonder why jaguars Napo and Goshi have not mated after six years together, and a new species of cricket arrives at the insect house(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A woman who suffers from nocturnal epileptic fits brings in Pearl, a Staffordshire bull terrier that can sense when these episodes are about to happen. However, the dog has problems with its knees and struggles to walk, so the pressure is on for Noel Fitzpatrick to restore it back to full health. Plus, an Irish setter has a cancerous tumour in its front leg, and a cat needs its jaw wiring back together after being hit by a car(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Londoner Chris Ostwald decides to build a New England-style water mill in the Chilterns, on a hill and nowhere near any water, after being inspired by an illustration on a yoghurt pot. He bought the plot 20 years previously and it has always been his dream to build a retreat for himself and his family. Everything seems to be going smoothly, until a neighbour complains the house is breaking its planning consent. Kevin McCloud presents(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As autumn sets in, Dick and Angel harvest their pumpkins in the walled garden and organise a family wheelbarrow race. The basement is the latest room to be transformed, serving as a nerve centre for the whole chateau, a space for storing deliveries, and Dick's workshop. The old piggery is also renovated, in anticipation of some new arrivals(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: In the early hours of Sunday morning, a call handler in the South Western Ambulance Service 999 control room receives a report that two people have been stabbed in the street by a stranger. Despite the best attempts of paramedics and the crew of the Wiltshire Air Ambulance, the injuries sustained by one of the victims prove fatal. As Wiltshire Police launch a full-scale murder investigation to find the perpetrator, all is not as it may first have seemed in a case that raises difficult questions about why people carry knives, and how they should be punished for doing so(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on knife crime, with police in Northamptonshire having seen an almost 70 per cent increase in such incidents over the past five years. After a man is threatened with a knife in Aldi, PC Brett McKenna and a Taser team go to arrest the perpetrator and search his flat, while PC Steve Cheatham attends the scene of a reported stabbing on a a residential estate in Corby(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Frontline
programme.desc: Paramedics are called to an emergency in which a three-month-old baby has stopped breathing and is unconscious, and also attend a road traffic collision involving a quad biker(n)

programme.title: Mary Kills People
programme.desc: Mary and Ben join forces, while Travis reveals a crucial detail about Ben's investigation(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Two of the young Asian elephants contract the herpes virus, leaving the keepers doing everything they can to save the animals' lives, using anti-viral medication and a pioneering blood transfusion. When silvery gibbon Tilu gives birth, dad Alven has to keep their older son, tearaway Eko, in check. The keepers wonder why jaguars Napo and Goshi have not mated after six years together, and a new species of cricket arrives at the insect house(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A woman who suffers from nocturnal epileptic fits brings in Pearl, a Staffordshire bull terrier that can sense when these episodes are about to happen. However, the dog has problems with its knees and struggles to walk, so the pressure is on for Noel Fitzpatrick to restore it back to full health. Plus, an Irish setter has a cancerous tumour in its front leg, and a cat needs its jaw wiring back together after being hit by a car(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Spain to meet an entrepreneur who is investing a large amount of money in an attempt to farm the critically endangered Atlantic bluefin tuna. With just one of these fish selling for a record £1million at auction in Tokyo, the rewards could be huge. Kate Quilton investigates why ice cream in freezers can sometimes get gritty ahead of the best before date, while Matt Tebbutt tries to find out what the difference is between the supermarkets' premium and budget range of frozen peas(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies shows Warren and Jacqui Sumner five properties in Crete within a £75,000 budget. The couple first visited on their honeymoon and have been going back ever since(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Best friends Alison and Sheila want to go halves on a holiday home in Costa Rica to escape the British winters. Danni Menzies shows them five properties for their £300,000 budget(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Alex and Danny Moore in Preston, and offer the pair advice on whether they should renovate their home or put it on the market. Danny wants to do up the property and sell it on, but Alex has other ideas, and thinks the house is the perfect place for them to start a family(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB host a 90th birthday party, and a family begin working on their Yoga retreat. Elsewhere, the day of the wedding party arrives for Tim and Margareeth(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First aid manager Jacqui hosts the first dinner party in Perth, where she plans to impress her guests, optometric consultant Daniel, cabinet-maker Craig, administrator Lorea and procurement officer Jenna with her hearty cuisine, including a sticky toffee pudding(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Aspiring actor Daniel hosts the second dinner party in Perth, and hopes to impress his fellow contestants with a twist on the traditional Scottish menu - serving spaghetti hagginaise for his main and soft-drink flavoured ice-cream for dessert. But with outspoken guest Jenna admitting her dislike for the host, the attention is diverted away from the food(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: For the third party from Perth, Lorea is on a mission to showcase the culinary delights of her native home in northern Spain, and her fiesta commences with a pink cocktail and an exotic quartet flown over from the Basque country especially to impress. She reveals that she used to model in the nude, which perplexes her guests, and there are tensions at bay between Daniel and Jenna, which threaten to spoil the evening(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Procurement officer Jenna hosts the fourth night of the competition in Perth, and tries to deliver the perfect evening. However, she struggles to hide her feelings toward aspiring actor Daniel after they have bickered all week, despite first aid manager Jacqui's attempts at reconciliation(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final day in Perth, and Kiwi Craig's turn to throw a dinner party before the winner is named. He hopes that his land and sea menu of prime lobster and wild boar will see him score highly, but hadn't counted on Jenna and Craig's tiara quarrel from the night before raging on into his evening. The host tries his best to calm the couple, but tensions mount to the point where cutlery is slammed down and one guest storms out(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Nantwich and Stoke-on-Trent, where Henry comes across a 1960s moped, and Simon restores an early Mirror Dinghy(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Special edition of the documentary which gets up close and personal with the animals in Chester Zoo's aquatic habitat. Rare blind cave fish Tiny Tim needs a love potion to help him become a father, and Popeye the chalk bass - the toughest fighter on the reef - needs an urgent operation after injuring his eye in an altercation. The zookeepers hope to breed from Ophelia the Mexican lake salamander, of which there are only 100 females left in the world, while young penguin Frazzle needs to find a mate and settle down to family life. But he cannot seem to stop flirting with every female in sight(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel tries to fix a cocker spaniel's leg problems by fitting two bionic back feet, before launching a series of investigations into what is causing a cat to drag its leg. Plus, a Westie puppy with a fractured knee arrives, but it cannot keep still(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets a couple who have built their own houses in the past, but have now come up with a scheme far more ambitious than anything they have undertaken previously. David and Greta Iredale's new home is being designed and fabricated in Germany, then transported to Surrey to be assembled within a week. Once it has been erected, they face the challenge of putting their own stamp on the property(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Programme following Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree through the process of buying and restoring a French chateau that has been empty for the past four decades. Their new home has 12 acres of land, nine outbuildings, a walled garden and a moat - but it also has no electricity, heating or water, and proves to be a far more complicated DIY project than expected(n)

programme.title: The Queen's Lost Family
programme.desc: The inside story of the royal family over three turbulent decades from the 1920s to the end of the Second World War. It begins just after the First World War, as monarchies throughout Europe have toppled, and most working men and many women now have the vote(n)

programme.title: Prince Albert: A Victorian Hero Revealed
programme.desc: Professor Saul David examines Prince Albert's significant influence on British culture, governmental policy and even international relations in his short life. The queen's consort faced an uphill struggle to be taken seriously by a nation and parliament that viewed him with hostility, but by the time of his death at the age of 42, he was widely regarded as a forward-thinking reformer. The programme draws on the private papers in the Royal Archives to gain a full picture of his legacy(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tree surgeon David, 27, is airlifted to St George's after falling 40ft to the ground, hitting several branches on his way down and landing head-first onto concrete. Having been knocked unconscious for 10 minutes, the medical team must urgently assess him for internal injuries. Anne, 74, arrives with a sharp pain in her chest, 51-year-old taxi driver Mark receives treatment for a cut on his finger caused by broken glass, and 92-year-old Betty is brought in by ambulance after her carers found her with slurred speech and a shaking hand(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy quiz, with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson joined by guests Jo Brand and Claudia Winkleman. Countdown regular Susie Dent is in Dictionary Corner with Bill Bailey, while maths expert Rachel Riley provides the letters and numbers with a little 'help' from Joe Wilkinson(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Special edition of the documentary which gets up close and personal with the animals in Chester Zoo's aquatic habitat. Rare blind cave fish Tiny Tim needs a love potion to help him become a father, and Popeye the chalk bass - the toughest fighter on the reef - needs an urgent operation after injuring his eye in an altercation. The zookeepers hope to breed from Ophelia the Mexican lake salamander, of which there are only 100 females left in the world, while young penguin Frazzle needs to find a mate and settle down to family life. But he cannot seem to stop flirting with every female in sight(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel tries to fix a cocker spaniel's leg problems by fitting two bionic back feet, before launching a series of investigations into what is causing a cat to drag its leg. Plus, a Westie puppy with a fractured knee arrives, but it cannot keep still(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton travels to the mountains of southern Peru, the home of some of the world's finest coffee, before visiting a coffee maker in Europe to learn about the process that turns coffee beans into instant granules. Meanwhile, Jimmy Doherty tests high-end and cheaper versions of vodka, and Matt Tebbutt investigates Wensleydale cheese(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Bedfordshire couple Dean and Karen Dhinsa find a rural retreat in southern Tenerife. The pair dream of spending their retirement in a sunny climate, and are looking for a home within easy reach of the island's beaches, complete with a cave to transform into a cinema, all on a budget of £180,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman heads to northern Tenerife to help Edinburgh couple John Clark and David Cameron find a dwelling that will eventually become their retirement home. With their wedding just weeks away, the pair have £100,000 to find somewhere that will accommodate a future mother-in-law as well as five visiting children(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Farhalls in Windsor, who are unsure whether to sell their four-bed detached house or transform the layout of their home. Graham loves living in Windsor, but Nardeth is growing tired of their cramped and dated house, and would prefer to look for a new property they could purchase(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick helps Erin and JB fix the rusty hinges on their solarium doors. Tim and Margareeth decide to launch a foodie weekend, and May and Jack prepare the yoga room for guests(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Zumba teacher Amanda hosts the first dinner party in Weston-super-Mare, where she hopes to impress her guests Harry, drama teacher Nancy, businesswoman Tracy and estate manager Chris with a locally sourced Somerset menu. Although the evening starts off with some friendly banter, it soon turns sour for some of the contestants(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rugby fan and sports centre manager Harry hosts the second night in Weston-super-Mare, where he hopes to wow his guests with a traditional Hungarian menu, complete with beef in hunter's sauce and bird's milk with meringue dumplings(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Weston-super-Mare, drama teacher and music lover Nancy throws an Austrian-themed party to reflect her love of the country and its music, with a menu featuring wiener schnitzel and venison stew. The starter proves to be a hit with the guests, but her main course fails to impress, and the atmosphere grows tense when Chris compares her dessert to the worst food experience of his life(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Farm-estate manager Chris hosts the fourth party in Weston-super-Mare, Somerset, and hopes his African-based menu can impress his guests. He serves savoury doughnuts, which are a new experience for his fellow diners. However, his main course of deep fried beef doesn't go down as well, leaving his chances of winning the competition resting on the evening's entertainment(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Businesswoman Tracy hosts the final dinner party in Weston-super-Mare, and her dance-inspired evening includes lessons in cha-cha and tango as well as a black-tie dress code. Her guests tuck into a main course of steak cooked to each person's taste, which proves difficult to co-ordinate(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole restores a petrol pump and turns a hubcap into a clock, and Simon O'Brien repurposes a copper immersion heater into a stylish wash basin(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the hidden lives of the animals of Chester Zoo. The Asian elephant family welcome a new arrival. Grumpy matriarch Thi has been pregnant for almost two years and is reaching the end of her tether. She's given birth to a stillborn baby in the past, so the keepers have a close eye on her. Cameras also follow Red panda Jung, who has been getting the cold shoulder from his partner Nima since they had two cubs(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Pioneering veterinarian Noel Fitzpatrick plans to use groundbreaking cell technology to repair damaged cartilage in a 10-month-old golden retriever that helps a five-year-old girl cope with epilepsy. A cat arrives at the surgery with a suspected rat bite that seems to be getting bigger, and a whippet is brought in after being hit by a car - sustaining multiple pelvic fractures(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs Revisited
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits Helen Gould and Phil Reddy five years after they built an earth-sheltered home in Cumbria. The presenter finds out if the house has survived without water leaking in and whether it has delivered the eco-friendly life the couple desired(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick, Angel and the family move into their crumbling chateau, which they find they will be sharing with bats, birds and thousands of flies(n)

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Reynolds begins to build his department as Dr Sharpe battles scepticism from a patient's parents. Max helps Bloom find a solution for a pregnant patient in a tough spot(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The trauma team at St George's Hospital in south-west London fights to save the life of a young woman involved in a motorbike accident, which has completely severed her right leg below the knee. An 11-year-old boy is brought in after having a prolonged epileptic seizure, and a 19-year-old arrives with a sewing needle stuck in her foot, but she seems more keen on taking advice from her mum in Bulgaria than from the doctor(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
